Jumbotail is an India-based B2B e-commerce and ôNew Retailö platform focused on the food and grocery sector. Founded in 2015 by S. Karthik Venkateswaran and Ashish Jhina, the company is headquartered in Bengaluru, Karnataka.

The company operates a full-stack digital marketplace that connects small retailers (kirana stores) with brands and wholesalers, enabling efficient procurement of groceries and daily essentials. Alongside its marketplace, Jumbotail provides integrated services including supply chain and logistics, fintech solutions (such as working capital credit), and retail technology platforms.

A key aspect of its business model is helping traditional kirana stores modernize through its ôNew Retailö ecosystem, which includes POS systems, inventory management, analytics tools, and the J24 convenience store network.

Jumbotail aims to organize IndiaÆs fragmented food and grocery ecosystem using technology and data-driven solutions, serving hundreds of thousands of small businesses across the country.

What is the important details need to do company profiling

Here are the important details needed to do a complete and professional company profile, explained clearly and simply. You can use this as a checklist ??

1. Basic Company Information

These are the foundation of any profile:

2. Company Overview / Introduction

What the company does

?? This is usually a 1û2 paragraph snapshot.

3. Vision, Mission & Values

4. Products & Services

Detailed but structured:

6. Infrastructure & Operations

7. Quality Standards & Certifications

Very important for credibility:

ISO / IATF / CE / REACH / RoHS, etc.

Compliance with regulatory standards

8. Sustainability & CSR (if applicable)

Environmental practices

Waste management

Energy efficiency

9. Management & Leadership

Board of Directors

Key leadership team

Years of experience / expertise

10. Achievements & Milestones

Major projects

Growth milestones

Strategic partnerships

11. Clients & Partnerships (optional but powerful)

Industry associations

Strategic partners

12. Financial Highlights (optional / sensitive)

Growth rate

13. Company Culture & Workforce

Number of employees

14. Contact Information

Address

Phone number

Email

Website

15. Future Plans & Growth Strategy

Account_Name__r.Description:
Rockman Industries, a key entity within the Hero Group, is one of IndiaÆs premier manufacturers of aluminum die-casting components, alloy wheels, and carbon composites.

Originally founded in 1960 as Rockman Cycles to manufacture bicycle parts, the company pivoted significantly in the late 1990s. Today, it serves as a critical Tier-1 supplier for major global automotive brands including Hero MotoCorp, Honda, TVS, Hyundai, and Ford.
Core Business Areas
The company operates across three primary industrial segments:

Aluminum Die Casting: They are one of the largest aluminum foundries in India, utilizing High Pressure (HPDC), Low Pressure (LPDC), and Gravity Die Casting (GDC) to produce engine and transmission parts.

Alloy Wheels: A dominant player in the Indian market, producing over 15 million two-wheeler alloy wheels annually and expanding into the four-wheeler market via a partnership with Hands Corporation (Korea).

Jumbotail is an India-based B2B e-commerce and ôNew Retailö platform focused on the food and grocery sector. Founded in 2015 by S. Karthik Venkateswaran and Ashish Jhina, the company is headquartered in Bengaluru, Karnataka.

The company operates a full-stack digital marketplace that connects small retailers (kirana stores) with brands and wholesalers, enabling efficient procurement of groceries and daily essentials. Alongside its marketplace, Jumbotail provides integrated services including supply chain and logistics, fintech solutions (such as working capital credit), and retail technology platforms.

A key aspect of its business model is helping traditional kirana stores modernize through its ôNew Retailö ecosystem, which includes POS systems, inventory management, analytics tools, and the J24 convenience store network.

Jumbotail aims to organize IndiaÆs fragmented food and grocery ecosystem using technology and data-driven solutions, serving hundreds of thousands of small businesses across the country.
